title: Evaluate vehicle paintwork for damage and identify refinish requirements
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Evaluate vehicle paintwork for damage and identify refinish requirements demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Use work instructions to determine job requirements1.2 Read and comply with workplace safety requirements and workplace environmental practices and policies1.3 Read, interpret and comply with workplace policies, safety requirements, procedures, legal requirements, and component supplier specifications1.4 Select and check safety equipment, tools, materials and other equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use work instructions to determine job requirements1.2 Read and comply with workplace safety requirements and workplace environmental practices and policies1.3 Read, interpret and comply with workplace policies, safety requirements, procedures, legal requirements, and component supplier specifications1.4 Select and check safety equipment, tools, materials and other equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use work instructions to determine job requirements1.2 Read and comply with workplace safety requirements and workplace environmental practices and policies1.3 Read, interpret and comply with workplace policies, safety requirements, procedures, legal requirements, and component supplier specifications1.4 Select and check safety equipment, tools, materials and other equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Assess vehicle paintwork for damage

pcs.text: Locate vehicle to be inspected2.2 Inspect paintwork to identify vehicle paintwork damage and potential paint problems2.3 Inspect vehicle in line with workplace policies and procedures, legal requirements, specification of vehicle manufacturer or component suppliers, safety requirements and workplace environmental practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate vehicle to be inspected2.2 Inspect paintwork to identify vehicle paintwork damage and potential paint problems2.3 Inspect vehicle in line with workplace policies and procedures, legal requirements, specification of vehicle manufacturer or component suppliers, safety requirements and workplace environmental practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate vehicle to be inspected2.2 Inspect paintwork to identify vehicle paintwork damage and potential paint problems2.3 Inspect vehicle in line with workplace policies and procedures, legal requirements, specification of vehicle manufacturer or component suppliers, safety requirements and workplace environmental practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess vehicle paintwork for damage

elements.title: Gather vehicle data and specifications

pcs.text: Identify and document painting specifications3.2 Consult staff and management to identify additional or altered specifications3.3 Evaluate existing paint refinish materials and equipment3.4 Compile and document vehicle data and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document painting specifications3.2 Consult staff and management to identify additional or altered specifications3.3 Evaluate existing paint refinish materials and equipment3.4 Compile and document vehicle data and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document painting specifications3.2 Consult staff and management to identify additional or altered specifications3.3 Evaluate existing paint refinish materials and equipment3.4 Compile and document vehicle data and specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Gather vehicle data and specifications

elements.title: Evaluate and select materials, equipment and processes

pcs.text: Determine materials and equipment options4.2 Assess materials and equipment for quality finish and conformity to standards4.3 Compare specifications of materials and equipment for performance and cost4.4 Determine commercial, environmental and safety impact of materials and equipment selected4.5 Select materials, equipment and processes based on performance, cost, specifications and impact comparison4.6 Complete evaluation report detailing required specifications and repair process according to workplace policies and procedures, and legal requirements
